name: steam-profile-dashboard
description: Data visualization web app for Steam profiles.

scripts.postinstall: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../cloudflare-worker && npm install && cd ../backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.preview: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run preview:frontend"
scripts.download-datasets: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('datasets')) fs.mkdirSync('datasets');" && curl -L -o datasets/steam-full-market-dataset.zip https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1/datasets/download/evyatarbensegal/steam-full-market-dataset && curl -L -o datasets/steam-store-data.zip https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1/datasets/download/amanbarthwal/steam-store-data && python -c "import zipfile, os; [zipfile.ZipFile(f'datasets/{z}').extract(f, 'datasets') for z, f in [('steam-full-market-dataset.zip', 'game_analytics.csv'), ('steam-store-data.zip', 'steam-games.csv')]]"
